title: Portfolio Website
shortDescription: เว็บไซต์พอร์ตโฟลิโอ พร้อมแอนิเมชัน dark theme, showcase และ admin dashboard
longDescription: A modern, animated portfolio website built with Next.js 15, Framer Motion, and Tailwind CSS v4. Features cinematic entrance animations, dark celestial theme, about page with skill bars and experience timeline, project showcase with detail modals, integrated shop for selling templates, full admin dashboard with analytics, and proxy layer for third-party integrations. SEO optimized, fully responsive, and production-ready.
features: Cinematic entrance animation with letter-by-letter reveal
Dark celestial sidebar with navigation
About page with grouped skill bars and timeline
Project showcase grid with animated modals
Integrated shop with checkout flow
Admin dashboard with analytics
API proxy layer for external services
Fully responsive (mobile + desktop)

title: Enterprise WMS (Warehouse Management System)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการคลังสินค้าครบวงจร รับเข้า-จัดเก็บ-หยิบ-แพ็ค-ส่งออก พร้อม Real-time Dashboard
longDescription: A comprehensive enterprise-grade Warehouse Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features 28+ pages covering the complete warehouse workflow: inbound receiving with supplier management, putaway task automation, real-time inventory tracking across warehouses/zones/bins, space & zone management with occupancy visualization, pick list generation, packing with box management, stock counting with variance detection, returns processing, and full user/role management with audit logging. Includes a modern indigo enterprise UI theme, bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching, real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts, advanced data tables, and role-based access control.
features: 28+ pages covering complete warehouse workflow
Inbound order receiving with supplier management
Putaway task automation with bin assignment
Real-time inventory tracking across warehouses/zones/bins
Space & zone management with occupancy visualization
Pick list generation and management
Packing with box management and item tracking
Stock counting with variance detection
Returns processing with reason tracking
User & role management with RBAC
Audit logging for all operations
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Modern indigo enterprise UI theme
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and charts
Advanced data tables with sorting/filtering/pagination

title: POS (Point of Sale) System
shortDescription: ระบบขายหน้าร้านครบวงจร จัดการสินค้า ตะกร้า ชำระเงิน สต็อก และรายงาน
longDescription: A comprehensive Point of Sale system built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features a full-width POS terminal with product grid, barcode scanning, cart management with hold/resume, and multiple payment methods (Cash with numpad, Card, PromptPay, Transfer). Includes product & variant management, category organization, customer loyalty tracking, inventory management with stock adjustments, sales analytics with interactive charts, end-of-day cash reconciliation, user management with role-based access (Admin/Manager/Cashier), and complete store settings. Built with an emerald/teal enterprise theme and bilingual support (Thai/English).
features: Full-width POS terminal with product grid and cart panel
Barcode scanner support with rapid keystroke detection
Multiple payment methods: Cash (numpad), Card, PromptPay, Transfer
Cart hold/resume for serving multiple customers
Product management with variants (Size S/M/L)
Category management with drag-sort ordering
Customer loyalty tracking with purchase history
Inventory management with stock adjustments
Sales analytics with interactive charts (daily/weekly/monthly)
End-of-day cash reconciliation and daily close
User management with RBAC (Admin/Manager/Cashier)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Emerald/teal enterprise UI theme
Receipt generation with print support
Transaction history with refund/void capabilities

title: Enterprise CRM (Customer Relationship Management)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการลูกค้าสัมพันธ์ จัดการผู้ติดต่อ บริษัท ดีลไปป์ไลน์ และวิเคราะห์ยอดขาย
longDescription: A comprehensive Customer Relationship Management system built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features contact and company management with detailed profiles and interaction history, deals pipeline with customizable kanban board stages, activity tracking (calls, emails, meetings, tasks), sales dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts, pipeline reports with conversion metrics, team performance tracking, and full user/role management with audit logging. Includes bilingual support (Thai/English), tags and advanced filtering, data export, and role-based access control (Admin/Manager/Sales Rep). Built with an amber/orange enterprise theme.
features: Contact management with detailed profiles and interaction history
Company management with hierarchy and associated contacts
Deals pipeline with drag-and-drop kanban board
Activity tracking: calls, emails, meetings, and tasks
Sales dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Pipeline reports with conversion metrics and forecasting
Team performance tracking and leaderboard
Role-based access control (Admin/Manager/Sales Rep)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Fully responsive design for desktop and mobile
Audit logging for all CRM operations
Tags and advanced filtering across all entities
Data export to CSV/Excel

title: Enterprise TMS (Transport Management System)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการขนส่งครบวงจร จัดการยานพาหนะ คนขับ เส้นทาง และการจัดส่ง
longDescription: A comprehensive Transportation Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features fleet management with maintenance tracking and vehicle status monitoring, driver management with license and certification tracking, route planning with distance and duration optimization, shipment tracking with visual timeline and status updates, delivery records with customer ratings, expense tracking with fuel consumption analytics, comprehensive reports, and full RBAC with 4 roles (Admin/Fleet Manager/Dispatcher/Driver). Includes bilingual TH/EN support and teal/cyan enterprise theme.
features: Fleet management with maintenance scheduling and vehicle status tracking
Driver management with license, certification, and availability tracking
Route planning with origin/destination, distance, and duration optimization
Shipment tracking with visual timeline and real-time status updates
Delivery records with customer ratings and proof of delivery
Expense tracking with fuel consumption analytics
Comprehensive reports: fleet utilization, delivery performance, fuel efficiency
Role-based access control (Admin/Fleet Manager/Dispatcher/Driver)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Teal/cyan enterprise UI theme with responsive design
28 pages covering complete transport workflow

title: Enterprise IMS (Inventory Management System)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการสินค้าคงคลังอัจฉริยะ ติดตาม Stock, Lot, Serial, การโอนย้ายและการปรับปรุง
longDescription: A comprehensive Inventory Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features product catalog with categories and UoM conversion, multi-warehouse stock tracking across zones and bins, lot tracking with expiry dates, serial number tracking, stock transfers between warehouses, stock adjustments with approval workflow, automatic replenishment with reorder points, stock movement history with audit trail, and comprehensive reports (valuation, aging, ABC analysis). Includes 5-tier RBAC, bilingual TH/EN support, and cyan enterprise theme.
features: Product catalog with categories and UoM conversion
Multi-warehouse stock tracking across zones and bins
Lot tracking with expiry dates and FIFO/FEFO support
Serial number tracking for individual items
Stock transfers between warehouses with approval workflow
Stock adjustments with reason codes and approval chain
Automatic replenishment with configurable reorder points
Stock movement history with full audit trail
Comprehensive reports: valuation, aging, ABC analysis
5-tier RBAC (Admin/Manager/Supervisor/Operator/Viewer)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Cyan enterprise UI theme with responsive design

title: Enterprise SCMS (Supply Chain Management)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการห่วงโซ่อุปทานครบวงจร จัดซื้อ ซัพพลายเออร์ สัญญา และวางแผนอุปทาน
longDescription: A comprehensive Supply Chain Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features procurement workflow (PR→RFQ→Quotation→PO→GR), supplier management with evaluation radar charts, contract management with expiry tracking, risk management with impact/probability assessment, demand forecasting, supply planning, sales order management, and comprehensive procurement reports. Includes 5-tier RBAC, bilingual TH/EN support, and indigo enterprise theme.
features: Procurement workflow: PR→RFQ→Quotation→PO→Goods Receipt
Supplier management with evaluation radar charts
Contract management with expiry tracking and renewal alerts
Risk management with impact/probability assessment matrix
Demand forecasting with historical data analysis
Supply planning with inventory optimization
Sales order management and fulfillment tracking
Comprehensive procurement reports and analytics
5-tier RBAC (Admin/Procurement Manager/Supply Planner/Buyer/Viewer)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Indigo enterprise UI theme with responsive design

title: Enterprise PMS (Production Management System)
shortDescription: ระบบจัดการการผลิตครบวงจร วางแผนผลิต, BOM, Work Order, OEE และ Quality Control
longDescription: A comprehensive Production Management System built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features production planning with scheduling, Bill of Materials (BOM) management with tree visualization, work order lifecycle (Draft→Scheduled→In Progress→Completed), real-time production line tracking, OEE monitoring with gauge charts, quality control with inspections and NCR management, maintenance task scheduling, downtime logging, and production costing. Includes 5-tier RBAC, bilingual TH/EN support, and orange enterprise theme.
features: Production planning with scheduling and capacity management
Bill of Materials (BOM) management with tree visualization
Work order lifecycle: Draft→Scheduled→In Progress→Completed
Real-time production line tracking and monitoring
OEE (Overall Equipment Effectiveness) monitoring with gauge charts
Quality control with inspections and NCR management
Maintenance task scheduling and tracking
Downtime logging with root cause analysis
Production costing with material and labor tracking
5-tier RBAC (Admin/Production Manager/Quality Engineer/Operator/Viewer)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Real-time dashboard with KPI cards and analytics charts
Orange enterprise UI theme with responsive design

title: Enterprise Dashboard (Executive Intelligence)
shortDescription: แดชบอร์ดรวมศูนย์สำหรับผู้บริหาร เชื่อมข้อมูลจากทุกระบบ พร้อม AI Forecast และ Anomaly Detection
longDescription: A comprehensive Enterprise Intelligence Dashboard built with Next.js 16, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL. Features executive summary with 8 KPIs and system health scores, warehouse analytics, transport analytics, inventory analytics, production analytics, supply chain analytics, advanced analytics with linear regression forecasting and Z-score anomaly detection, report generation and scheduling, alert management, and multi-system data aggregation. Includes 3-tier RBAC, bilingual TH/EN support, and blue enterprise theme.
features: Executive summary with 8 KPIs and system health scores
Warehouse analytics: inbound/outbound trends and space utilization
Transport analytics: deliveries, fleet utilization, and cost tracking
Inventory analytics: turnover, aging analysis, and ABC classification
Production analytics: OEE monitoring and quality metrics
Supply chain analytics: procurement performance and supplier evaluation
AI-powered forecasting with linear regression models
Anomaly detection with Z-score statistical analysis
Report generation and scheduling with export capabilities
Alert management with configurable rules and notifications
Multi-system data aggregation from all enterprise modules
3-tier RBAC (Admin/Analyst/Viewer)
Bilingual support (Thai/English) with instant switching
Blue enterprise UI theme with responsive design

title: E-Commerce Management Suite
shortDescription: ระบบอีคอมเมิร์ซครบวงจร จัดการสินค้า คำสั่งซื้อ ชำระเงิน และวิเคราะห์ยอดขาย
longDescription: A full-stack e-commerce platform built with Next.js and Prisma. Features dynamic product catalog with category-based custom attributes (JSONB), complete order lifecycle management (pending → paid → delivered), PromptPay QR payment integration, Stripe support, usage analytics tracking, shop funnel metrics, and a full admin dashboard. Built with SQLite, ready for production deployment on Vercel.
features: Dynamic product catalog with custom JSONB metadata per category
Complete order lifecycle management
PromptPay QR code payment integration
Stripe credit card payment support
Email notifications via Resend API
LINE Notify order alerts for admin
Usage analytics with conversion funnel
Admin dashboard with charts and export
